nasb.text: And the son said to him, ‘Father, I have sinned against heaven and in your sight; I am no longer worthy to be called your son.’

esv.text: And the son said to him, ‘Father, I have sinned against heaven and before you. I am no longer worthy to be called your son.’

cnv.text: 兒子說：‘爸爸，我得罪了天，也得罪了你，不配再稱為你的兒子。’

ccb.text: 小儿子说，‘父亲，我得罪了天，也得罪了你，今后，我再也不配做你的儿子。’

csbs.text: 儿子说：‘父亲，我对天犯了罪，也在你面前犯了罪。我再也不配称为你的儿子。’
